{{Infobox character
| name = Ozmanthus Arelius
| aliases = Ozmanthus
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Iron body]], Path of pure destruction, [[Death Icon]], bloodline ability to see, [[Soulfire|soulfire]], dismantled techniques}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|, madra manipulation}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Monarch]], Patriarch of the Arelius clan}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Arelius family|Arelius clan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[Arelius family]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Soulsmith]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[labyrinth|the labyrinth]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Reaper (novel)|Reaper]]
}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Identity:''' later revealed to be [[Eithan]], who he became in the present day.}}

''See also: [[Ozmanthus Arelius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ozmanthus]] Arelius was the founding patriarch of [[House Arelius]] and is remembered as a legendary [[Soulsmith]]. Throughout his [[life]], he was driven by a childhood quest for [[Arelia]] and demonstrated immense genius in the [[sacred arts]], specifically through his mastery of refining and his ability to design unique [[Iron]] bodies. His reputation was so significant that his personal crest eventually became the symbol for his entire [[House]]. He was a highly accomplished figure who sought to leave a lasting legacy by training descendants to match his own capabilities, and it is suggested that upon his ascension, he found no equals even in the heavens. In various forms, [[Ozmanthus]] appears as an echo or a fragment of his former will within a [[labyrinth]]. These manifestations, which possess approximations of his memories and personality, often appear as an unassuming man with pale hair and a broom. Despite these diminished forms, he retains his characteristic arrogance, wit, and immense authority over the [[labyrinth]]'s ancient mechanisms. His influence persists through his [[Soulsmith inheritance]], which provides others with his technical insights and combat instincts. Furthermore, the [[Arelius bloodline]] is associated with a specific ability involving nearly invisible strands of [[madra]].}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|As the original Patriarch of the Arelius clan, [[Ozmanthus]] Arelius was a renowned [[Soulsmith]] who possessed maximum potential in six of the seven [[Abidan]] Divisions. His immense capabilities meant he could have inherited the [[Mantle]] of any [[Judge]], with the sole exception of [[Suriel]]. While watching falling ash, he was overcome by a sense of personal failure. He eventually appeared as a black-and-white version of himself, having left behind a [[Soulsmith inheritance]] and the ability to dismantle techniques.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is a character who looked up into falling ash and felt he had failed.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c1">''Reaper'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] had maximum potential in six of the seven [[Abidan]] Divisions.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] could inherit the [[Mantle]] of any [[Judge]] except [[Suriel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] was the original Patriarch of the Arelius clan and a great [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] was an [[Arelius Patriarch]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] left a [[Soulsmith inheritance]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] appears as a black-and-white version of himself.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] dismantled techniques.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] had disused workshops within the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2">''Dreadgod'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|An echo of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]] appeared as a gray-white ghost.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The echo of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]] uses a broom.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] ascended into the heavens.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Regarded as one of the greatest [[Soulsmiths]] to ever live, [[Ozmanthus]] Arelius serves as a figure of pride for [[Eithan]]. His influence is felt when [[Lindon]] adopts one of his [[madra]] manipulation methods and encounters a black-and-gray manifestation of the smith alongside him. While he acts as [[Yerin's master]], his presence is also felt through laughter from within the narrator. Ultimately, Reigan absorbs [[Ozmanthus]] Arelius's [[Soulsmith inheritance]], which proceeds to taunt the [[Remnant]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] was one of the greatest [[Soulsmiths]] of all time.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] adopted a [[madra]] manipulation method from [[Ozmanthus Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|A black-and-gray [[Ozmanthus Arelius]] appeared next to [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is laughing from within the narrator.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is [[Yerin's master]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c18">''Waybound'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Reigan absorbed the [[Soulsmith inheritance]] of [[Ozmanthus Arelius]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]]'s [[Soulsmith inheritance]] is taunting the [[Remnant]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c33">''Waybound'', chapter 33</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is a figure of pride for [[Eithan]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A member of the [[Arelius family]], [[Ozmanthus]] Arelius exists within the [[labyrinth]] as a [[Forged]] echo. This entity is characterized by pale hair, colorless eyes, and a gentle smile. Clad in [[Forged]] clothes, the echo represents a figure who spent many years studying the first [[Abidan]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] exists as a [[Forged]] echo in the [[labyrinth]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] has pale hair and a gentle smile.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] is part of the [[Arelius family]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] spent years studying the first [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]]'s echo has colorless eyes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Ozmanthus Arelius]] wears [[Forged]] clothes.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c2" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Ozmanthus Arelius, the original Patriarch of our clan, was known as the greatest Soulsmith of his day,”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmiths]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
